startups.name: bnbagent
startups.description: Autonomous BSC trading agent — you sign once, it runs for a week, you can kill it with one button. CoinMarketCap x402 data ($0.01/call), Trust Wallet signed txs (keys never leave the host), BNB Chain ERC-8004 identity + ERC-8183 escrow. 3 sleeves + 3-LLM safety team.

startups.name: oneshot
startups.description: OneShot — chain-abstracted prediction & trading terminal. Fund from any chain in one click, take a position with one signature, hand execution to a scoped AI agent. Built for UXmaxx Hackathon (7702 Collective / Particle Network).

startups.name: nebula
startups.description: Nebula will be a monero layer 2. It targets tx speed, defi features, low fees, quantum resistance,  and much more.

startups.name: magpie-x402
startups.description: The first x402-native permissionless lending protocol — agents borrow SOL against memecoins/RWAs on Solana, arm self-owned in-vault take-profit/stop-loss exits, and repay, all permissionlessly (no signup, no API key, zero custody). TypeScript SDK + MCP server.

startups.name: RPG-Agents

startups.name: WastelandQueen

startups.name: codex-quota-glance
startups.description: Codex Quota Glance 是一款面向 Windows 的 Codex 用量监控工具，以桌面悬浮胶囊的形式实时显示 Codex 官方登录余量、API 模式下的今日 Token 消耗、缓存命中率、余额和今日花费等关键信息。  它支持 New API 多供应商管理、本地 SQLite 日志缓存、本地费用估算、人民币/美元显示切换，并通过低频同步机制减少平台接口压力。软件可长期驻留桌面，点击胶囊查看详情，右键打开设置，适合需要持续关注 Codex 使用量和 API 消耗成本的用户。
